name: Factory Terminal-Bench article
reason: The headline Droid comparisons use different model variants from Claude Code and Codex. Valid Terminal-Bench comparisons are covered under the benchmark family.

name: Harvey Legal Agent Benchmark introduction
reason: The launch defines the legal benchmark but publishes no comparison that changes the harness while holding the model fixed.

name: Harvey LAB initial results
reason: It compares models under a fixed harness. The later 22 June harness ablation is included instead.

name: FrontierSWE
reason: The benchmark repeats 17 long-horizon tasks, but each model currently appears under only one harness, so the harness effect cannot be isolated.

name: Artificial Analysis general agents catalogue
reason: This is a product catalogue, not a benchmark. Alternate Coding Agent Index URLs are merged into the single included study.
